revision.comment: remove invitations for custom styles that are coincidentally totally unused in template space, move invalid type to class
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none| | {{#if:{{{image|}}} |
{{{image}}}
| [[File:{{#switch:{{{type|}}} | setindex = DAB list gray.svg | disambig | #default = Disambig gray.svg }}|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] }} }}
{{{text}}}
{{#if:{{{imageright|}}}|
{{{imageright}}}
}}
{{#switch:{{{type|}}} | | disambig | setindex = | #default =
This message box is using an invalid "type={{{type|}}}" parameter and needs fixing.
[[Category:Wikipedia message box parameter needs fixing|{{main other|Main:}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|disambig|__DISAMBIG__|}}}}{{#switch:{{{type|}}} | setindex = {{category handler | main = [[Category:All set index articles]] | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} | page = {{{page|}}} }} | disambig | #default = {{category handler | main = [[Category:All article disambiguation pages]][[Category:All disambiguation pages]] | template = | other = [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} | page = {{{page|}}} }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
